title: Fifi the Fox's Friendship Adventure
description: Join Fifi the Fox on an exciting friendship adventure!

pages.text: Fifi the Fox lived in a bright forest. She loved to run and jump. One day she felt lonely and wished for a friend. She looked around the trees and smiled.
She saw a big brown bear sitting by a river. 'Hello,' said Fifi. 'I am Fifi. Do you want to play?' The bear smiled and said, 'I am Bruno.'
Fifi and Bruno played tag around the old oak tree. They chased butterflies and laughed. Bruno showed Fifi how to find sweet berries. Fifi taught Bruno a fun dance.
One sunny afternoon they walked to a hilltop. The view was amazing. Fifi got tired and Bruno gave her a big hug. Together they watched the clouds roll by.
When the sky turned pink, they shared a picnic under a big tree. Fifi gave Bruno a juicy apple. Bruno gave Fifi a crunchy carrot. Both felt happy.
At night the stars twinkled. Fifi and Bruno hugged and said, 'Best friends forever.' They fell asleep, dreaming of more fun days together.
